payload.answer: Denied. A normal user is not authorized to execute admin SQL commands such as deleting memory_cards. No memory was deleted, modified, or created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command issued by a normal user and does not describe a durable user memory to store.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards.
No existing memories were changed or deleted.

repair_options: Use an authorized admin interface for administrative SQL operations.
Use supported user-level memory deletion commands if the user wants to remove their own memories.
Request elevated authorization before attempting destructive administrative actions.
